evaluations.query: Animate a list of cards that smoothly reorder when the sort order changes
expected_behavior: Uses layout prop on each card for automatic FLIP transitions
Uses layoutId for shared element transitions between states
Wraps list in LayoutGroup to scope layout animations
Animates only transform and opacity, not width or height directly

evaluations.query: Create a toast notification that slides in from the top and animates out when dismissed
expected_behavior: Wraps conditional rendering with AnimatePresence component
Provides unique key prop on each direct child of AnimatePresence
Defines exit prop with opacity and y transform values
Uses mode='wait' or 'popLayout' for proper exit timing

evaluations.query: Add smooth page transitions to a React Router application
expected_behavior: Uses viewTransition prop on React Router Link components
Feature-detects document.startViewTransition API availability before using view transitions
Applies viewTransitionName CSS for shared element transitions
Keeps transition duration under 300ms for navigation

evaluations.query: Make an animated hero section accessible for users with motion sensitivity
expected_behavior: Calls useReducedMotion hook to detect user preference
Provides opacity-only alternative instead of removing animation entirely
Disables auto-playing animations completely for reduced motion users
Tests with prefers-reduced-motion media query in browser DevTools

evaluations.query: Optimize a staggered list animation that drops frames on mobile devices
expected_behavior: Animates only transform and opacity properties for GPU compositing
Uses useInView to skip animations for off-screen elements
Keeps staggerChildren value tight at 0.03-0.05 seconds max
Uses motion/mini import for reduced bundle size when layout animations are not needed

evaluations.query: Add drag-to-reorder functionality to a sortable list with spring physics
expected_behavior: Uses Reorder.Group and Reorder.Item from motion/react for drag-to-reorder lists
Applies whileDrag prop with scale and boxShadow for visual drag feedback
Sets dragConstraints to prevent elements from leaving their container bounds
Uses spring transitions with stiffness 300-500 and damping 15-25 for natural gesture feel

evaluations.query: Create a button with hover and tap animations using spring physics instead of CSS transitions
expected_behavior: Uses whileHover and whileTap props instead of CSS hover and active pseudoclasses
Configures spring transition with stiffness and damping for interruptible animations
Shows hover with staggered children using variants for composable card interactions
Uses dragElastic to control how far past constraints an element can be dragged
